name: victor-workflows
description: Victor's Codex workflow tools built around agent-friendly CLIs.

interface.longDescription: Small Codex skills that teach agents how to use local CLIs for thread search, workflow orientation, and review loops without dragging raw history into context.
defaultPrompt: Search my recent Codex threads for patterns worth turning into skills.
Find the Codex thread where this workflow went well.
Summarize recent workflow friction from my Codex history.
